sources.label: NHS England Pharmacy First GP referral pathway
borrowed: Keep patient choice explicit in the referral handoff.
Reflect that pharmacy may consult by telephone, video, or in person.
Keep outcome and follow-up language clinically honest.
rejected: Turning the chooser into a primary-care implementation guide.
Using operational transport language as patient-facing card copy.

sources.label: NHS service manual card guidance
borrowed: Use cards to group related content and actions for scanning.
Keep the provider comparison surface concise and scannable.
rejected: Using generic hub-card styling as the whole chooser layout.

sources.label: NHS service manual check answers guidance
borrowed: Keep one clear confirmation action near the current evidence.
Preserve prior answers or anchors when users change course.
rejected: Collapsing the chooser into a one-shot summary page before selection is stable.

sources.label: WAI-ARIA APG listbox pattern
borrowed: Do not use listbox for rich interactive option cards.
rejected: Using a composite listbox role for provider cards with buttons and chips.

sources.label: WAI-ARIA APG modal dialog pattern
borrowed: If a modal is used later, focus must move in and return logically to the invoker.
rejected: Using a modal for warned-choice acknowledgement in this task; the acknowledgement is inline instead.

sources.label: Playwright best practices
borrowed: Test user-visible behavior with stable, user-facing selectors.
rejected: Asserting hidden implementation details instead of rendered state.

sources.label: Playwright accessibility testing
borrowed: Use automated accessibility checks as one layer, not the whole a11y strategy.
rejected: Treating automated snapshots as a substitute for keyboard-flow coverage.

sources.label: Playwright visual comparisons
borrowed: Keep visual captures environment-stable and scenario-specific.
rejected: Using uncontrolled screenshot baselines across mixed environments.

sources.label: Linear UI redesign
borrowed: Low-noise hierarchy for headers, panels, and dense navigation surfaces.
rejected: Over-minimalizing the chooser until warnings and timing differences become easy to miss.
